scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix alagad-backend && npm install --prefix alagad-frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix alagad-backend" "npm run start --prefix alagad-frontend"
scripts.start:mobile:lan: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix alagad-backend" "npm run start:guest --prefix alagad-frontend"
scripts.start:mobile:https: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix alagad-backend" "npm run start:guest:https --prefix alagad-frontend"
scripts.start:mobile:with-backend-tunnel: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,backend-tunnel -c yellow,cyan,blue "npm run dev --prefix alagad-backend" "npm run start:guest --prefix alagad-frontend" "npm run tunnel:backend"
scripts.prestart:mobile:single-ngrok: kill-port 3000 3001 && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; Get-Process ngrok | Stop-Process -Force; exit 0"
scripts.start:mobile:single-ngrok: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,frontend-tunnel -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix alagad-backend" "set REACT_APP_API_URL=/api&& npm run start:guest:ngrok --prefix alagad-frontend" "npm run tunnel:frontend"
scripts.tunnel:all: concurrently -k -n frontend-tunnel,backend-tunnel -c magenta,blue "npm run tunnel:frontend" "npm run tunnel:backend"
scripts.start:prod: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run start --prefix alagad-backend" "npm run start --prefix alagad-frontend"
